# Test Rust/Cargo identity derivation in inspect commands

# --- Setup: create apx.yaml with org ---
exec sh -c 'echo "version: 1" > apx.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "org: acme" >> apx.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "repo: apis" >> apx.yaml'

# --- inspect identity shows Crate and Rust module when org is set ---
exec apx inspect identity proto/payments/ledger/v1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'Crate:      acme-payments-ledger-v1-proto'
stdout 'Rust mod:   acme_payments::ledger::v1'

# --- inspect identity 3-part (no domain) ---
exec apx inspect identity proto/orders/v1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'Crate:      acme-orders-v1-proto'
stdout 'Rust mod:   acme_orders::v1'

# --- inspect release shows Rust coords ---
exec apx inspect release proto/payments/ledger/v1@v1.0.0-beta.1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'Crate:      acme-payments-ledger-v1-proto'
stdout 'Rust mod:   acme_payments::ledger::v1'

# --- JSON output includes Rust coords ---
exec apx --json inspect identity proto/payments/ledger/v1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout '"module": "acme-payments-ledger-v1-proto"'
stdout '"import": "acme_payments::ledger::v1"'

# --- openapi format works ---
exec apx inspect identity openapi/billing/invoices/v1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'Crate:      acme-billing-invoices-v1-proto'
stdout 'Rust mod:   acme_billing::invoices::v1'
